summary: Focused testing of Google Sign-In addition and regression of email/password + logout. Backend: 16/16 pytest passed (invalid/empty session-token rejection, JWT regression, simulated Google session via direct MongoDB insert covering /api/auth/me, /api/events create+list, logout deletes user_sessions row, /api/auth/me returns 401 after logout, and startup indexes: users.email unique, user_sessions.session_token unique, TTL on user_sessions.expires_at). Frontend (mobile viewport 390x844): sign-in-google-button and sign-up-google-button render with correct 'Continue with Google' label; tapping the sign-in Google button navigates window.location to https://auth.emergentagent.com/oauth/?redirect=<origin>%2F (the Emergent service redirects the root URL to /oauth/); email/password sign-in with test@hymn.app / TestPass123! still succeeds and lands on /today; Me tab -> Log out returns to /sign-in.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' on web. Same as previous iteration - non-blocking. Reference: /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx centerButton styles.

critical_code_review_comments: get_current_user correctly handles BOTH bearer types: it first tries user_sessions (Google) then falls back to JWT (email/password). Verified end-to-end with direct Mongo-seeded session_token.
/api/auth/google-session validates empty/whitespace tokens (400) and rejects unknown/invalid tokens against the real Emergent auth service (401 'Invalid Google session'). No mocks needed.
/api/auth/logout deletes the user_sessions row matched by the bearer token; subsequent /api/auth/me correctly returns 401.
Startup indexes are all present: users.email unique, user_sessions.session_token unique, and TTL index on user_sessions.expires_at (expireAfterSeconds=0). Verified via pymongo index_information().

Frontend googleAuth.ts sets window.location.href = 'https://auth.emergentagent.com/?redirect=<origin>/' on web. The Emergent auth service performs a 30x redirect to /oauth/... which is expected behaviour (final observed URL: https://auth.emergentagent.com/oauth/?redirect=...). This matches the spec 'navigate to https://auth.emergentagent.com/?redirect=...'.
seed_data_creation: Created ephemeral email/password user autotest+jwt<ts>@hymn.app and Google-simulated user autotest+google<ts>@hymn.app + one event each; cleaned up in test_cleanup step. test@hymn.app / TestPass123! left intact.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google-auth pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_google_auth.py is fully self-contained and idempotent. It simulates a Google session via direct Mongo insert into user_sessions {session_token, user_id, expires_at (tz-aware, 7d future), created_at} matching the shape written by /api/auth/google-session. Login testID pattern: sign-in-email-input/sign-in-password-input/sign-in-submit-button (use .first because RN web renders duplicate <input>). Logout flow: tap tab-me -> logout-button. Google buttons: sign-in-google-button, sign-up-google-button. Web redirect URL observed as https://auth.emergentagent.com/oauth/?redirect=... (Emergent redirects / to /oauth/).
rca_of_issue: No bugs found. Both new Google auth code path and existing email/password path work correctly.
